items.claim: Cody Gibson will utilize footwork, front kicks, and boxing combinations to keep Hussein off him early.
items.quote: utilize footwork, front kicks up the middle, and just try to pick at Abdul Hussein where with with some of those technical boxing combos that we see Cody Gibson bring to the table.

items.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the remaining skills and physical miles at this stage of his career to deal with a younger fighter like Hussein.
items.quote: I just don't know that Cody Gibson has the skills at this point and and the miles left on him to be able to deal with a super young dangerous guy in Abdul Hussein.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is susceptible to being put away with a big shot or troubled on the ground when pressured on his heels.
items.quote: we've seen that if you can get Cody Gibson, you know, on his heels, you can land a big shot and put him away, but you can also take him down and give him some problems on the ground

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is a young, explosive, and well-rounded talent who outmatches Cody Gibson.
items.quote: I just think Abdul, he's young, he's explosive, he's wellrounded... I just feel like he's outmatched here by a young, explosive, well-rounded talent in Abdul uh Hussein.

items.claim: Nurolo Aliev visually resembles a smaller version of Khabib Nurmagomedov.
items.quote: This guy kind of looks like a little bit of a minihab, right? He's got, you know, the the the the hairstyle. He looks like Habib a little bit, right?
